commands.review_summary:
The branch makes Codex app-server approval routing provider-aware for local/custom models, adds guarded internal exec auto-review helpers, updates Codex tests, exports a new Plugin SDK exec-review runtime subpath, and includes small lint cleanups.

PR surface: Source +1260, Tests +2233, Config +4, Other +1. Total +3498 across 26 files.

Reproducibility: yes. by source inspection: current main maps auto exec to Codex `auto_review` regardless of provider, and upstream Codex routes `auto_review` through Guardian approval review.
commands.review_followup: - [P2] The maintainer-labeled PR changes compatibility and exec-approval trust policy, so it needs human maintainer review rather than an automated repair lane.

target.title: fix(codex): avoid guardian review for local models
target.body:
## Summary
- Downgrade Codex app-server Guardian/model-backed approval reviewers to user/OpenClaw approvals unless the effective reviewer context is clearly OpenAI.
- Treat explicit custom providers, provider-qualified local model refs, persisted binding model providers, side-question forks, and bound conversation turns as fail-closed for Guardian/model-backed review.
- Add OpenClaw internal exec auto-review for Codex app-server command approvals only for `tools.exec.mode=auto`, simple parsed command approvals, and an explicit `tools.exec.reviewer.model` under `openai/...`; unsafe control commands, amendments, security-audit suppression, unparsed commands, and reviewer ask decisions fall back to plugin/human approval.
- Refresh the Plugin SDK API baseline for the exec auto-review contract and keep the SDK import/export topology acyclic.

## Real behavior proof
Behavior addressed: local/custom model Codex app-server auto approval no longer tries to use Codex Guardian/model-backed review, and internal exec auto-review requires an explicitly OpenAI-qualified reviewer model.
Real environment tested: local focused Vitest/static checks in the Codex worktree with a temporary shared `node_modules` symlink; delegated Blacksmith Testbox changed gate; GitHub PR CI on head `1e12845434ed0760deb7559f92b766729c3558fa`.
Exact steps or command run after this patch: `node scripts/run-vitest.mjs extensions/codex/src/app-server/thread-lifecycle.test.ts extensions/codex/src/app-server/thread-lifecycle.binding.test.ts extensions/codex/src/app-server/config.test.ts extensions/codex/src/app-server/app-server-policy.test.ts extensions/codex/src/app-server/approval-bridge.test.ts extensions/codex/src/app-server/run-attempt.test.ts extensions/codex/src/app-server/side-question.test.ts extensions/codex/src/conversation-binding.test.ts extensions/codex/src/conversation-control.test.ts`; `node --import tsx scripts/check-madge-import-cycles.ts`; `node scripts/check-plugin-sdk-subpath-exports.mjs`; `git diff --check`; `node scripts/crabbox-wrapper.mjs run --provider blacksmith-testbox -- env OPENCLAW_CHECK_CHANGED_REMOTE_CHILD=1 OPENCLAW_CHANGED_LANES_RAW_SYNC=1 corepack pnpm check:changed`; `.agents/skills/autoreview/scripts/autoreview --mode branch --base origin/main`.
Evidence after fix: focused local Codex suite passed 9 files / 395 tests; rebased-head config regression passed 1 file / 95 tests; Madge reported 0 cycles; SDK subpath export check passed; final Testbox `tbx_01ktgtg2jzpk9gpfwth2576m3d` passed `check:changed` with exit 0; final autoreview reported no accepted/actionable findings for this PR diff; GitHub PR CI completed 160 checks with 0 failures.
Observed result after fix: policy, config, side-question, run-attempt, conversation-binding, conversation-control, approval-bridge, thread lifecycle, SDK export, typecheck, lint, import-cycle, and runtime-topology architecture checks pass on the rebased branch.
What was not tested: live LM Studio/Ollama app-server round trip was not run; coverage is via policy/bridge regression tests, Codex upstream source inspection, autoreview, Testbox changed gate, and GitHub CI.
